reviews.comment:
Nos tuvimos que desviar hacia San Martín por la caída de un puente en ruta 38 (01/02/2019).
Fue una suerte encontrarnos con esta estación. A pesar de la cantidad de gente, fuimos atendidos rápidamente en los surtidores.
Aprovechamos para tomar un café en el bar. La mejor manera de recargar las energías.

(Translated by Google)
We had to detour to San Martín because of a bridge collapse on Route 38 (February 1, 2019).
It was lucky we found this station. Despite the crowds, we were served quickly at the pumps.
We took the opportunity to have a coffee at the bar. The best way to recharge.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdU9tcXh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención,solo tendrían que tener un comedor y sería exelente,como camionero lo recomendaría porque es un punto super visitado por todos los viajeros,solo eso...

(Translated by Google)
Good service, they just need a dining area and it would be excellent. As a truck driver, I would recommend it because it's a very popular spot for all travelers, that's all...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMThUcmJ3EAE
